ranked_directional_change: Which category label has the {ranked_largest} {change_direction} from "{left_series}" to "{right_series}"?
Find the category where {change_expression} for "{left_series}" and "{right_series}" is the {ranked_largest}.
Across the labeled categories, which one shows the {ranked_greatest} {change_direction} from "{left_series}" to "{right_series}"?
Compare "{left_series}" and "{right_series}" for each category. Which category has the {ranked_largest} {change_action}?
Determine the category label with the {ranked_largest} {change_direction} when moving from "{left_series}" to "{right_series}".
ranked_absolute_gap: Which category label has the {ranked_extremum} absolute gap between "{left_series}" and "{right_series}"?
Find the category where the absolute difference between "{left_series}" and "{right_series}" is the {ranked_extremum}.
Across the labeled categories, which one shows the {ranked_extremum} gap between "{left_series}" and "{right_series}"?
Compare "{left_series}" and "{right_series}" for each category. Which category has the {ranked_extremum} requested distance between their values?
Determine the category label with the {ranked_extremum} absolute difference between "{left_series}" and "{right_series}".
ranked_series_share: Which category label has the {ranked_extremum} percentage share for "{target_series}" out of that category's total across all series?
For each category, divide "{target_series}" by the total of all series in that category. Which category has the {ranked_extremum} share?
Across the labeled categories, which one has the {ranked_extremum} requested share of "{target_series}" within its category total?
Use every series in each category to compute the category total. Which category has the {ranked_extremum} "{target_series}" share?
Determine the category label with the {ranked_extremum} percentage contribution from "{target_series}".
ranked_pair_ratio: Which category label has the {ranked_extremum} ratio of "{numerator_series}" to "{denominator_series}"?
For each category, divide "{numerator_series}" by "{denominator_series}". Which category has the {ranked_extremum} ratio?
Across the labeled categories, which one has the {ranked_extremum} requested ratio "{numerator_series}" over "{denominator_series}"?
Use the legend to read "{numerator_series}" and "{denominator_series}" for each category. Which category has the {ranked_extremum} ratio?
Determine the category label with the {ranked_extremum} percentage ratio of "{numerator_series}" to "{denominator_series}".
category_total_extremum_label: Which category label has the {ranked_extremum} total across all series?
For each category, add all series values. Which category has the {ranked_extremum} total?
Across the labeled categories, which one has the {ranked_extremum} sum over all series?
Use every series in each category to compute category totals. Which category label is the {ranked_extremum}?
Determine the category label with the {ranked_extremum} total value across the legend series.
series_rank_at_category_label: At category "{target_category}", which series has the {ranked_extremum} value?
Use the marks at "{target_category}" only. Which series has the {ranked_extremum} value there?
Within the category labeled "{target_category}", which legend series is the {ranked_extremum}?
Compare all series values at "{target_category}". What series label has the {ranked_extremum} value there?
For the single category "{target_category}", determine the series with the {ranked_extremum} value.
pair_equality_label: Which category label has equal values for "{left_series}" and "{right_series}"?
Find the category where "{left_series}" and "{right_series}" have the same value.
Across the labeled categories, which one shows matching values for "{left_series}" and "{right_series}"?
Use the legend to compare "{left_series}" and "{right_series}". Which category has equal values for them?
Determine the category label where the values of "{left_series}" and "{right_series}" are equal.

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Final answer format: {answer_hint}.

{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

{json_example}

query:ranked_directional_change.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested category label as a string
query:ranked_directional_change.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for the answer category's two queried series marks

query:ranked_absolute_gap.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested category label as a string
query:ranked_absolute_gap.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for the answer category's two queried series marks

query:ranked_series_share.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested category label as a string
query:ranked_series_share.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for every series mark in the answer category

query:ranked_pair_ratio.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested category label as a string
query:ranked_pair_ratio.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for the answer category's numerator and denominator series marks

query:category_total_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested category label as a string
query:category_total_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for every series mark in the answer category

query:pair_equality_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested category label as a string
query:pair_equality_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for the two equal-valued queried series marks in the answer category

query:series_rank_at_category_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested visible series label as a string
query:series_rank_at_category_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each "<category>:<series>" mark key to an [x,y] pixel point for every series mark at the queried category
